content:
- Completed the FK-heavy long-lane implementation, updated the task and plan markdown with checked boxes and `<passes>true</passes>`, and ran `.ralph/task_switch.sh` successfully.
- All required lanes passed: `make check`, `make lint`, `make test`, and `make test-long`; the final boundary shape keeps a generic CDC harness plus a thin default-scenario wrapper while the FK-heavy scenario lives in the same long-lane integration crate to stay warning-free under `clippy -D warnings`.
- Next: stage only the task-relevant code and Ralph state changes, commit with the required `task finished ...` format including test evidence, push, and stop immediately.

- Finished the FK-heavy initial-scan/live-catchup task end to end: task + plan marked complete, `.ralph/task_switch.sh` ran, commit `5fff34a` was created, and pushed to `master`.
- Added a reusable CDC long-lane harness, kept the baseline scenario on a thin wrapper boundary, and proved the FK-heavy parent/child/grandchild scenario with real constraints, live catch-up, repeated reconcile stability, and real `runner verify`.
- All required lanes passed before completion: `make check`, `make lint`, `make test`, and `make test-long`. Remaining worktree dirt is unrelated and intentionally left unstaged: `.agents/skills/info-about-repo/SKILL.md` deletion and `.ralph/tasks/story-15-ci-build-test-image-pipeline/`.
